name: Ultimate Dragonic Utopia Ray
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>体</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ドラゴニック・ホープレイ
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
(This card is always treated as "Number C39: Utopia Ray".)
Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets this card, or when this card is targeted for an attack (Quick Effect): You can equip 1 "ZW -" monster from your hand or Deck to this card as if it were equipped by that monster's effect. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target face-up cards your opponent controls up to the number of "ZW -" Monster Cards equipped to this card; negate their effects.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 5 monsters
(This card is always treated as "Number C39: Utopia Ray".)
Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets this card, or when this card is targeted for an attack (Quick Effect): You can equip 1 "ZW -" monster from your hand or Deck to this card as if it were equipped by that monster's effect. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target face-up cards your opponent controls up to the number of "ZW -" Monster Cards equipped to this card; negate their effects.
eff:
3 Level 5 monsters
(This card is always treated as "Number C39: Utopia Ray".)
Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated that targets this card, or when this card is targeted for an attack (Quick Effect): You can equip 1 "ZW -" monster from your hand or Deck to this card as if it were equipped by that monster's effect. action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Equips from the player's hand to itself
Equips from the player's Deck to itself
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
